video_title: Top #DDD Burger Videos in the Western US | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: Gastro Grind
restaurants.guy_intro: We're here to check out a joint where a husband and wife and a stepson are doing burgers outside of the box. This is Gastro Grind.

dishes.description: Burger patty topped with lobster, lemon aioli, romesco sauce, garlic anchovy aioli, brie cheese, frisee lettuce, and crispy onions, served on a potato bun.
dishes.guy_response: There's so much big flavor in this. With the bromesco, the brie, the anchovy aioli, then on top of it with the lobster, a very sophisticated burger. Your flavors all coincide together. They work together very well. Good texture to it, too. That's the real deal right there. That's the one.

restaurants.name: The Skirted Heifer
restaurants.guy_intro: So I'm here in the center of it all, right downtown in Colorado Springs, Colorado, to check out a funky burger joint. This is the Skirted Heifer.

dishes.description: Grass-fed beef patty with a skirt of shredded Wisconsin cheddar cheese, lettuce, red onions, pickles, tomatoes, and homemade heifer sauce, served on a homemade focaccia bun.
dishes.guy_response: That's doing it right. I mean, that's a 10 out of 10.

restaurants.name: Grilla Burger
restaurants.guy_intro: So I'm here in Palm Desert, California, just about 20 minutes from Palm Springs. I'm here to check out a joint where a family of four is serving up some classic and not-so-classic burgers. This is Grilla Burger.

dishes.description: Burger featuring habanero relish, roasted serrano, jalapeno, and habanero peppers, chipotle onions and peppers, chipotle ketchup, pepper jack cheese, bacon, sriracha mayo, and habanero salsa.
dishes.guy_response: Here's the deal, Chef. You make the salsa, the tomatoes sweeten it up, caramelize the jalapenos, remove the skins. You do all these little things that add to it, so you get this nice, really well-rounded, easy-to-eat patty. And the chipotle onions? Oh. Oh, dynamite burger.

restaurants.name: The Crest Cafe
restaurants.guy_intro: It's San Diego's Hillcrest area. This is the Crest Cafe.

dishes.description: Hamburger patty stuffed with herb butter (basil, parsley, tarragon, garlic, cayenne), cooked on a broiler, topped with cheese and garlic mayo, served on a bun.
dishes.guy_response: There's tons of flavor. That's ridiculous what you do. When it says butter burger, take the dude's word for it. Nice job. Excellent burger.

restaurants.name: Burger Me
restaurants.guy_intro: Top-notch burger joint that is all about simple, fast, and fresh. This is Burger Me.

dishes.description: Bison burger with provolone cheese, mortadella, general salami, lettuce, tomato, pickle, hot chopped boston peppers, and cabernet vinaigrette, served on a bun.
dishes.guy_response: Okay, that's delicious, man. So you get the hot of the burger, the hot chili pepper, but right in the middle, championship cold cuts.

restaurants.name: The Skirted Heifer
restaurants.guy_intro: So I'm here in the center of it all, right downtown in Colorado Springs, Colorado, right across from Acacia Park. Now, I'm here to check out a funky, funky burger joint owned by a local family that has a name that you just won't forget. This is the Skirted Hepburn.

dishes.description: One-third pound grass-fed beef patty with peach wood bacon, cream cheese, and Bloody Mary sauce, served on a homemade focaccia bun.
dishes.guy_response: Oh, my God. That is so good. This burger's dynamite.

restaurants.name: La Tostadaria
restaurants.guy_intro: Welcome back. I am hanging out at La Tostadaria with Chef Fernando. This guy's got a story that you will love.

dishes.description: Wild Mexican shrimp patty, Oaxaca cheese bun, chipotle aioli, lettuce, tomato, onion, avocado mango radish salsa, and shredded potatoes for crunch.
dishes.guy_response: Good news is that's fantastic. The bad news is the crew's hitting the vending machine. When you bite into it, you get the saltiness of the cheese, the texture of the cheese, the shrimp's cooked perfectly, and then all the accoutrement. The shredded lettuce, the chipotle mayo, the tomato, the raw onion, the phenomenal salsa with the mango and the avocado. I pride myself in my burgers. I'm known for my burgers. That right there, in my expectation level of burgers, that is about as high as they go.

restaurants.name: Dr. Feelgood's Kitchen
restaurants.guy_intro: So when I hear there's a chef that's all about farm-to-table, and he's got a restaurant where the name kind of plays a little homage to one of my favorite Smotley crew, you know I gotta check it out. This is Dr. Feelgood's kitchen.

dishes.description: Nine-ounce patty made from house-cured and ground pork belly, served on homemade potato bread with mayonnaise, heirloom tomatoes, and organic greens.
dishes.guy_response: Well, this is what everybody wants a BLT to be like. You're getting the volume of a burger, the flavor of the bacon, the whole top of that patty. It's just all that crispy, crunchy, unctuous flavor. Then on the inside, it's super tender. It's just done perfectly. I mean, it's BLT of another level. You are a dangerous man.

dishes.description: Hamburger patty with cheese, bacon, peanut butter, chipotle aioli, sriracha sauce, tomatoes, and onions, served with house-made eclectic chips (purple yam, regular yam, potatoes, Japanese yam, taro root, lotus root).
dishes.guy_response: That's good. That chipotle aioli and a little bit of the sriracha take the burger from being sweet and really heavy peanut butter to being a little spicy peanut butter like a Thai peanut dipping sauce. Delicious chips. I see what everybody liked about the peanut butter burger. Maybe it just took me some time. Hey, Triple X team, I'll come back. I'll try the burger again, all right?

restaurants.name: Paradise Valley Burger Company
restaurants.guy_intro: So I'm here in Phoenix, Arizona, right by Paradise Valley to check out a joint where this guy is doing some crazy things to burgers. This is Paradise Valley Burger Company.

dishes.description: Two deep-fried, floured beef patties topped with country fried gravy (red onion, jalapenos, garlic, heavy cream, thyme), lettuce, and fried onions, served on a square-cut brioche bun.
dishes.guy_response: I just listened to you talk about how you make this burger. Cutting the bun so you can get full contact. Making the patties thin so you can put a nice crust. It's legit. It's enthusiastic. It takes the regular, everyday burger to another level. I mean, it really is, man. It's great.

dishes.description: Beer-battered and deep-fried beef patties, topped with green chili bacon vodka cream sauce (bacon, red onion, jalapenos, garlic, vodka, heavy cream, roasted green chilies, cilantro) and pickled Fresno chilies (sugar, liquid smoke, whiskey).
ingredients: green chili bacon vodka cream sauce
dishes.guy_response: I agree, man. You got all kinds of great crunch. Salt. A little spice coming in there. You've got a passion for it, and it comes out in the burger, man. You're about to make a grown man cry. I'm telling you what, this is prime time, buddy.
